park_name: BIG4 Shepparton Park Lane Holiday Park

reviews.review_text:
We stayed here for 1 night while travelling from Sydney to Mount Gambier.

The cabin was clean and the bed was comfortable.  This is a pet friendly park so we were able to take our Labrador Lucy.

While we didn’t really have time to check out the parks features, while walking Lucy I did notice that there was a lot of residential homes on site. A lot of these were really lovely.

Staff here are super friendly and really went out of their way to accommodate us and make sure we had a great stay.
Very clean and tidy park, great facilities

I stopped in at Big 4 Shepparton for one night, in my van as I was travelling through.
Everything from booking, to arriving and then leaving the next day was easy and smooth.

The grounds were quite peaceful and quiet at night, which was great and the amenities blocks was good and clean.  The grounds overall looked clean and tidy.

The staff here were so welcoming and warm. Immediately felt at home. The mix of residential and short term accommodation doesn't always work but in this case it does! Everyone we came across was so friendly. The park was kept in wonderful condition. The trampoline pillow was a huge hit with the kids. Many hours spent bouncing.

We stayed in cabin 13 and it was clean and comfortable. Not a lot of space but honestly what you expect. The shared spaces were great - microwave, kettle, bbq, crockery etc

Easter egg hunt put on by the staff was a wonderful touch. Would definitely stay again when next in the area.

We were due to pour a slab in Kialla on 1 Apr, booked a room for 2, couple of hours later, our job got cancelled, tried to cancel my room, but i was refused, booking stayed, got no refund, didn't stay in the venue. Disappointed with the management!
Beautiful. All amenities lovely and clean. Well tended gardens, cheap powered sites and cute decorations. Would totally stay again.
Nice little park, very clean ammeties.
Perfect Park and perfect location staff was lovely and the grounds are very well kept|The rooms were comfortable and immaculate inside and out, great value for money
Stayed here for 2 nights. Cabin was clean and modern with a decent size balcony, for us 3 travellers.

2nd year we have stayed there with grandkids and they loved it again. The jumping pillow, rec room with wifi and games were a big hit. They loved the sparkling clean pool and riding their bikes around. We stayed on a powered site with ensuite which was really convenient for us. Site was large enough for caravan, swags and 2 cars. Managers were friendly and the camp kitchen was well equipped with free bbqs, oven, microwave, hot plates, fridge, toaster, kettle and cooking utensils and pots. Grounds were well looked after and everything was great. No doubt we’ll be back. Thanks😊

Holiday  |  Family|Stayed 6 days ago after a 1100klm drive and was abysmal. CABIN 9 needs a bulldozer at the least.|Holes in flooring, windows that do not close, air con above the bed shakes the bed when operating, front fly screen door flew off in the wind, cabin was very dusty and floors had hair all over like the showe....if THIS IS BIG 4 standard, NEVER again would stay in a Big 4.|Rooms: 1/5  |  Service: 3/5  |  Location: 2/5||Rooms|CABIN is a disgrace, as there were 5 other dogs in the park cabins I can not blame it on our 8kg 4 legged family member being with us that we were alloted this cabin havin booked 2 months in advance.||The managers need to get of their office chairs and have a look at what they are selling.

Stayed 6 days ago after a 1100klm drive and was abysmal. CABIN 9 needs a bulldozer at the least.
Holes I n flooring, windows that do not close,  air con above the bed shakes the bed when operating, front fly screen door flew off in the wind, cabin was very dusty and floors....if THIS IS BIG 4 never again.
Lovely place to stay
I generally rate the big4's pretty good but this one was mediocre. The bathrooms were deffinelt
Very enjoyable peaceful stay the staff were always helpful happy and polite.l’ve stayed a couple of time and l will definitely stay again

Close to shops and petrol station. Lovely and quite well kept caravan park. Stayed at cabin 17 with my show dog for 3 nights.  Lovely cabin, spotless, had everything I needed. Bed was better than my own 😆.  Plenty of room to park. Great communication. Great price....have recommended it to friend and family and would stay there again

Lovely caravan park. Beautiful gardens and properties well kept. Clean facilities. Very quite. My cabin I stayed in was spotless. I was very happy with my stay. I will definitely be coming back to explore Shepperton as I didn't have much time over the 3 days I stayed. I will be requesting the same cabin if possible. I have already recommending big 4 park lane in Shepperton as a great pet friendly place to stay. I also felt very safe there
Lovely place to stay the night!

Perfect stop on our family road trip!
We absolutely loved our stay at BIG4 Park Lane. The jumping pillows were a huge hit for our little one, and the grounds were beautiful and so well kept. Everything felt calm, safe, and family-friendly. The amenities were spotless and modern, making it an easy and comfortable stop on our journey. Couldn’t ask for better — we’ll definitely be back next time we’re passing through!
Great park. Very tidy and well represented. Facilities are very clean and tidy. A credit to the staff.

We recently camped on a powered site for Grand final and enjoyed every bit of it. The ladies in the office and “the wood man” were all great! The site was super clean and very well looked after. The utility blocks were also really well looked after, they even included soap and hair products. The only thing I could want for was perhaps a squeegee to clear the floor after showers as it became a bit of a mess as the night would go on (no floor mat or raised step/platform) but nothing slides on doesn’t fix. We throughly enjoyed our stay. Thanks for running a great family friendly facility!

*I thought we would hear planes night and day but only noticed two during the day over our stay

Our 2-night stay at BIG4 Shepparton Park was a complete disappointment. We came with our kids hoping for a relaxing break, but it turned out to be one of the most uncomfortable holidays ever.

We stayed in Cabin No. 06, and it was in terrible condition. The queen bed was completely unstable, shaking and moving with every turn, and the mattress was badly sunken in the middle. It was impossible to sleep properly, and we ended up with back pain instead of rest.

When I mentioned this to the receptionist, she wasn’t rude but simply said no one had complained about it before — which honestly makes me wonder if anyone from management even checks these cabins. Later, the housekeeping lady told me she had already reported this issue long ago, but nothing has been fixed. That clearly shows management just doesn’t care.

The floor was dirty, and overall, the cabin felt poorly cleaned and badly maintained. For what they charge, the condition of this place is unacceptable.

It’s disappointing to see that BIG4 Shepparton Park seems more interested in collecting money than providing a proper holiday experience. We went there to relax and left with sore backs and frustration. Definitely not recommended until they fix their maintenance and management issues.

The park is great for families. My children loved all of the activities available to them to keep them occupied. The location is very quiet so your not disturbed and it's close to everything. The cabin is decked out with everything you need to make a stay comfortable and the front desk is very helpful with excellent customer service
The grounds and cabins were very clean & tidy. We thoroughly enjoyed out stay. The kids loved it and we will be returning later this year.

Where do I start?
We stayed in a pet friendly cabin because we were travelling across multiple states to pick up our dog, so I am no stranger to a bit of pet hair/pet odours, BUT, the smell of this cabin was unbearable, before even entering the cabin the cat urine smell was very strong, the kids bunk beds smelt so strong that there was either cat urine in the mattresses or directly under them that had not been cleaned.
If it wasn’t so late and we weren’t all completely exhausted there is no way I would have stayed there, the only reason my kids fell asleep in that stench is because they were so exhausted.
All around the toilet was very discoloured on the ground, I wiped near it with a makeup wipe and it was brown after 1 wipe.
The microwave had food splattered inside.
No TV remote
The park was also disappointing, no carts for the kids to ride around in (which is fine, but it is advertised)
The jumping pillow was already partly deflated when we got there so it was hard to bounce, and continued to go down.
We didn’t bother with the pool, the pool cleaner machine was still in it, and it all looked very poorly upkept.
The kids enjoyed the games room but it was also quite average.
Majority of the park it seems are permanent residents with signs for guests not to enter those streets so there wouldn’t be much area for kids to ride around anyway.
I would not stay here ever again. I would get a refund if I could, and if I wasn’t with my children or pets I would have left at 10pm.
The only reason this park gets any kind of positive rating is because the receptionist was so warm and welcoming and friendly.
There was also a dog roaming around a lot from another guest (I do understand dogs can be sneaky and wander away)
But this happened on numerous occasions, even trying to approach our cabin because our kids were eating at the outside table.
I’m sure it was a friendly dog, but after seeing one of your children attacked by a dog I do not take any chances with animals I do not know.
This place is fantastic both my children loved this park plenty for them to do great cabins and all the staff couldn't be more friendly highly recommended for all families

It’s a shame the shower was wasting so much water, ( the plumber did not arrive in three days we were there) and the pool wasn’t open on the hot 25 C day we arrived . However the jumping pillow and tyre maze were excellent . There are no pedal cars here. The staff were great loaning us a ladder when we needed it, the coffee made was really good .  The camp kitchen is well appointed.

We were stranded for a week in Shepparton due to car troubles. The staff here were absolutely amazing and made a stressful experience so much better. They really looked after us and our dog and provided exceptional care from the cleaning ladies to reception. Thank you so much and we will always be grateful

Booked in here for the caravan and camping show and was very much pleased with the quality family cabin ,the friendly service and the closest to the CBD of sheperaton .
Very quiet park too .
Would stay here again .

I'm a bit late to write this, and I don't often leave reviews, but I felt that I must in this case. Big 4 Shepparton is a lovely park, with warm, welcoming and caring staff. I don't remember the caretaker's name, but she is a friendly and bubbly lady, originally from NZ. I found her to be the nicest caretaker I've come across on our travels. I arrived with our van after-hours following a long dive, with two children, one only an infant. We opened the envelope to find we were given a surprise upgrade to an ensuite site for our two night stay. It was an overwhelming gesture of kindness and although tired from the trip, we all had a big smile on our faces. It was Mother's Day weekend, and it made my day even more special. I came across this wonderful lady the next day, who said "I thought it might make it a bit easier for you with the kids". She was so tentative and kind toward myself and my children and made our stay a comfortable one.

The park is in a great location, the amenities are nice and clean, there is a fun tyre maze which entertained both myself and the kids for hours, a big jumping pillow, pedal bikes, and safe roads within the park to enjoy riding them.

Most of all,  it's the thoughtful and kind nature of the caretaker which inspired this 5 star review. In a world where there is a lot of negativity, there are people you come across who help you see the good in the world. Thanks for making my Mother's Day memorable, for engaging the kids the way you did, and for the friendly service you provide at Big 4 Shepparton. If ever we are heading your way again, we will be sure to stay.

Thank you
Lovely park. Very clean . Friendly staff. Thank you 😊

I was travelling through and booked online shortly before arriving, and was greeted by friendly staff at reception.
The park is clean and easy to navigate. I mentioned I was traveling alone and was given a site I could easily access with out having to reverse in.
I will defiantly stay here again when in the area.
Had a great time at the park, my two dogs also loved the stay. Fully recommend staying there

Have stayed there along time ago, boy has it changed for the better. On arrival in was greeted with a friendly smile and warm welcome. The receptionist was friendly and very helpful. The amenities where presented in an excellent condition. Well worth the stay.

The powered en suite  site we had was so good, we had plenty of  room to put the awning out without being cramped . The ensuite was one of the cleanest we have had. With lovely white towels and hand towels. The lady on reception was so friendly and we loved her New Zealand accent.

We had site 43 ensuite site for 2 nights,
The site was big and easy to reverse into. Our ensuite was lovely and clean, and it was  lovely to have a hot shower. The lady on reception was helpful and friendly, loved the kiwi accent. All staff were friendly. It's such a well laid out park. And if we are travelling this way again. We will certainly book in here again

Travelled up to Shep for BMX racing and the caravan park was the perfect place to stay. Facilities were fantastic and the park was immaculate.

Thanks for a great weekend.

We have really enjoyed our stay over the Easter break, staff have been beyond lovely and definitely make a great coffee:) the kids don’t want to leave, The park has so many things to keep the kids entertained and the sites are great!

This is definitely one of the best Big 4 caravan parks I’ve been to.|I love the way they’ve done the toilet and showers and they are very clean,  The staff were very friendly and extremely helpful.|I definitely would recommend this caravan park.|👍

Great location with easy access, and fairly close to Shepp' city. We had our two Jack Tzu's with us, and they were welcome at the park, just make sure that keep them off the bedding. Staff were friendly, check-in and check-out was easy, and the rooms were clean and ready to go. We didn't use the pool, but it did look good.

Lovely clean well set out park
Van spots well placed to get in and out
Pretty fairy lites on  trees.

We stayed on a site in our 21ft caravan, not a room,  so we can't comment on those BUT the service from Sonja & Ian was outstanding. Nothing was too much trouble for them.
The site we had was huge, the toilets clean, and the park well maintained.
We'd come back.

This Park is a 5 out of 5 as it is immaculate! The Camp Kitchens are spotless and have everything you need and more! The amenities are spotless! The grounds don't have a blade of grass out of place and it is a great place to stay for families also as it has a jumping pillow & swimming pool, it is quiet and would recommend it anybody! Well Done all at the Park!

Great camping. The staff is very accommodating, and we even received a free upgrade. Ian, the owner, is super friendly and genuinely invested in helping his guests. We came to Shepparton to look for farm work, and he helped us by showing us job opportunities. One rainy night, he let us sleep in the games room because our tent wasn’t waterproof.

We’ll definitely be back whenever we pass through Shepparton.

It isn't really what you would expect from a Big4, but it is good if you just want to stay for a few nights. There is a pool and jumping pillow, which is good for the kids and the receptionist is friendly. Plus, as well as a regular male/female amenities block there is a unisex amenities block, where you get your own little private compartment which are all nice and clean. However, the majority of the park is residential, which is a bit wierd.

In Shepparton, there isn't too much to do, but there are a few places with access to the Goulburn River which is good paddle-boarding, kayaking or fishing. There is also the Aquamoves Aquatic Park nearby which is great fun for the family.

It is a good park for a few nights or a stopover but you wouldn't want to stay too long as there isn't much to do.
Great park , plenty of things to keep the kids entertained, huge sites and very friendly staff
Amazing stay with clean pool and amenities and lovely polite staff. 10 out of 10 I would definitely stay.

Helpful and friendly staff. Park was clean and although just out of town it made for a quiet experience as it is only a small park. |Was a good base to explore the surrounding towns. The pool was good but the big aquamoves centre made up for size and space.

The booking was easy, the staff were really helpful and friendly. The amenities were great, there is no shade on the pool, which makes it hard when you want to bring the kids out in the middle of the day, especially when it’s in the middle of summer.
The rooms were great, our floor was pretty dirty and the beds had fleas, which our whole family got bitten (including the kids)
The beds were pretty uncomfortable to be honest. The paths were good, kids could ride their scooters, and they loved the balance beams and jumping ball.
Great service, friendly atmosphere, accomodating with truck parking

I always loved staying here until they gave me the absolute worst cabin in the park. Dusty, dirty and noisy. It even had holes in the wall around the air-conditioner and doors where insects flew in and kept me awake all night. Management refused to remedy the situation in any way. I am so disappointed, I have stayed in this park probably 50 times, I have aways found management to be very friendly and accommodating, now I won't stay again.
Great place to stay, management and staff fantastic (friendly staff and fabulous management team 😀 👏

We stayed here for 3 nights in a dog friendly budget cabin. The cabin was pretty basic but clean and comfortable. Great reverse cycle air conditioner, great cooking facilities, bed was comfy. Only thing I would recommend would be a bit of a tidy up around the cabin. All up, a great stay and would recommend this place without a hesitation, especially for pet owners.
They negleted to mention the Laundry isnt avaiable until 11 Nov 2024.

About 20 of us in Geelong life activities club stayed from Sunday to Friday early October and were provided with great service and accommodation mostly cabins and 2 caravan sites. The staff are very friendly and quick to attend any concerns. Great pancakes cooks as well.
Very happy to come again.
一進屋已聞到一陣怪味，孩子不喜歡浴室的門。玩的設施少，泳池細，沒有wifi. 大部分的渡假屋都是私人擁有。踩單車的地方只得好少。總之小孩不喜歡這個營地。
Would have given five but the pool solar heating is broken. Took me four hours to warm up again after doing my laps. We were in motorhome with luxury ensuite

Probably the worst big 4 that we have been too.

Bugs on chopping board.
The bathroom smelt horrible. My kids refused to even use the shower.
Dvd wasnt working. Spat one dvd at random mid movie. Next dvd stopped playing after 45 mins.
Channels were not working on tv.
Beds were uncomfortable.
Room of bunkbeds you cannot sleep in due to the noise from the next cabin heater.
Also the heater in our room was extremely loud when it was running.
Toaster had pieces of crumbs in the toaster.
If you plan on staying here bring an air mattress as we ended up sleeping on couch and bed in main area.
Only good thing about this place was we were able to bring our dog.
Ladies at front were lovely when checking in
My kids wanted to leave early even though i booked 2 nights. Not ideal place to stay if you have special needs im fortunate my boy was able to tell me he didnt want to stay.
Self check-in was seamless and our cabin was clean, tidy and comfortable. We would definitely stay here again.

Visited the park twice. The park facilities are nice and cozy, and the staffs are highly friendly and helpful.
Both my booking was a big tricky but they are very organised and managed the request so well.
Kitchen and kids playground are nice and tidy and the pool is very clean and water is very cool in an extremely hot weather as there is shades.
Located in the entrance of Shepparton and easily accessible to shops and restaurants.
Highly recommended!

We stayed in an ensuite powered site with our caravan, ensuite was nice and clean and area kept nice with easy parking. Reception service was friendly and the park was very quiet at night for a comfortable stay. Will definitely go back.

Our stay was pleasant.
Not a big park but it served our purpose.
Good location, amenities were clean and tidy, staff friendly.
We stayed for 2 nights on a powered site.
Dogs allowed.

Fabulous park with lovely staff. We booked last minute just before closing because we needed a pet friendly place and nothing was too much trouble even at 5 minutes before the office closed!! Unlike another park in the area
Small park that's beautifully maintained. Great for a short stop for a few days. Sites are spacious and facilities are very well maintained.
Clean, comfortable, and very friendly. Will stay again. Totally recommend.😊

Fabulous little park, catering very well for travellers but great facilities for a longer stay with family. Excellent facilities, huge sites and ensuite style amenities a real bonus. Very tidy, quiet and managers very hospitable and happy to help out. Everything you need is just down the road at the plaza and Peppermill Inn (a local favourite for a great bistro meal) is just a short easy walk. This is our “go to” park when visiting Shepp.

We spent a long weekend in one of the large cabins at the Park Lane Holiday Park. Overall, it was fine, and everything was there and worked. The facilities (bouncing pillow, playground) are a bit run down, by the standards of other Big4s we've stayed at. Everything in the cabin was in working order, but some things did need looking over (the aircon worked, but dripped; the shower worked, but smelled a bit). It's a really short drive up to shepparton, and the surrounding towns, so I highly recommend it for location.

we stayed on a powered site, Theresa and Deb were a wealth of information,  where to eat, shop, sites to see
Lovely and clean amenities
Highly recommend

Stayed here over Christmas 2023. Christmas Eve big storm came through and made a mess of the park. The staff went above and beyond to help myself and other guests save our trip. Thank you. We'll be back next year. Kids loved the pool and bouncy pillow too. Facilities are clean and well maintained.
Close and Handy to All.of Shepparton,  on main Road

FYI the whole park is bitumen with turf over it so you won’t get any type of pegs in the ground- even with an impact driver. Upon check OUT they informed us ‘we have special pegs you could have used’ which was never mentioned to us, not when we arrived and not when we asked to change sites. We couldn’t change sites because someone else was booked in the one we asked about- they only stayed 1 night and we stayed 3 so not sure why we couldn’t have swapped. If you have kids- don’t let them go past the round about as the residents get angry. In other words, you don’t have access to the whole park. The BBQs cost money to use. And the toilet block is 4 individual ensuites (toilet and shower in a room) those 4 toilets service ALL the campers. The pool is freezing cold and filthy, even after consecutive days of over 25 degrees.
You really get the feeling that this is a park for residents, not campers.

This park is managed by the friendliest staff who go above and beyond to ensure your needs are met. We were allowed to leave our van on-site till after check in due to sports tournament.

The toilets and showers were immaculate and plentiful without waiting.

Thank you team! Keep up the amazing work 👍

Came here during the grand final long weekend. Awesome location. If you don’t mind the noise come from the airfield front of the big4 then great spot. Very friendly staff.

Dog friendly too
Great place, stayed here for work and couldn't be better. Will have to bring the kid up next time.
Friendly staff..well presented ...well priced and right at waters edge
Very Enjoyable stay!
Nice park.  Very clean facilities.
Stayed for one night wirh 4 teenagers and couldn’t be happier . Great beds , really clean, excellent shower and easy to get in/out . Perfect for family accom .
Great spot. Nice park. Clean facilities.  Spacious room. Easy booking reasonable prices
